metadata.description: Relex — use Claude on your legal matters without ever exposing client PII.

plugins.name: relex-legal
plugins.description: Drive your Relex legal cases from Claude — read, reason, draft, and record over a PII-safe API. Clients' names and IDs are sealed with a key only the user holds, and document content is redacted client-side; Claude only ever works with de-identified labels.
